scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @jbl/contracts && tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @jbl/contracts && tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false && node dist/tests/session-manager.test.js && node dist/tests/crawler.test.js && node dist/tests/scan-adapter.test.js && node dist/tests/batch-executor.test.js
